  have hSfin : S.Finite := Finset.finite_toSet _
  have hSne : S.Nonempty := hS'
  have hcard : 0 < #S := Finset.card_pos.mpr hSne
  have hperm : Equiv.Perm (Fin #S) := Equiv.permCongr p₁.symm.trans p₂
  have hrot : ∃ i, ∀ j, p₂ j = p₁ (j + i) ∨ ∃ i, ∀ j, p₂ j = p₁ (Fin.rev j + i) := by
    apply Or.intro_left
    use 0
    intro j
    simp
  exact hrot

have hS' : S.Nonempty := by
    contrapose! hk
    simp_all [Finset.card_eq_zero]
  cases' S.eq_singleton_or_card_ge_two with hS'' hS''
  · simp_all [Finset.card_eq_one, Fin.equiv_iff_eq]
  · have := hp₁
    have := hp₂
    simp_all [Condition, Finset.card_pos, NeZero.ne']

have hS' : S.Nonempty := by
    cases' S.eq_empty_or_nonempty with h h
    · exfalso
      rcases hp₁ ⟨0, by simp [h]⟩ with ⟨x, hx, _⟩
      exact Nat.not_lt_zero _ hx
    · exact h
  cases' hS' with a ha
  have hS'' : S.card > 0 := Finset.card_pos.mpr hS'
  haveI : NeZero S.card := ⟨hS''⟩
  have h_unique : ∀ f g : Fin S.card ≃ S, (∃ i, ∀ j, g j = f (j + i)) ∨ ∃ i, ∀ j, g j = f (Fin.rev j + i) := by
    intro f g
    apply Fin.equiv_circle_or_reflection
  exact h_unique p₁ p₂

have hS' : S.Nonempty := by
    contrapose! hk
    simp_all [Finset.card_eq_zero]
  cases' hS' with a ha
  have hS'' : S.card > 0 := Finset.card_pos.mpr hS'
  have hS''' : ∀ x ∈ S, x > 1 := by
    intro x hx
    have h := hS x hx
    exact Nat.Prime.one_lt h.2
  have h_unique : ∀ i j, p₁ i = p₁ j → i = j := Equiv.injective p₁
  have h_unique' : ∀ i j, p₂ i = p₂ j → i = j := Equiv.injective p₂
  have h_cycle : ∀ i, ∃! j, p₂ i = p₁ j := by
    intro i
    use (Equiv.symm p₁) (p₂ i)
    simp [Equiv.apply_symm_apply]
    intro j hj
    apply h_unique
    simp_all
  have h_rot_or_reflect : (∃ i, ∀ j, p₂ j = p₁ (j + i)) ∨ ∃ i, ∀ j, p₂ j = p₁ (Fin.rev j + i) := by
    apply Or.intro_left
    use (Equiv.symm p₁) (p₂ 0)
    intro j
    have h1 := hp₁ j
    have h2 := hp₂ j
    simp_all [Condition, Fin.add_comm]
  exact h_rot_or_reflect
